About This Story

In this inspiring story, Jin faces a big challenge. Her parents want her to have safe careers like doctor or lawyer. But Jin dreams of a creative career. She feels pressure to honor their sacrifices. Through choosing her own dreams, Jin learns that maybe choosing your own path is the ultimate expression of gratitude. This story shows the struggle between tradition and personal dreams.

Imagine being sixteen years old and locking yourself in a bathroom to cry. Jin worked at her father's restaurant every summer. Her father expected her to take over the business one day. But Jin wanted something different. She wanted to help people. Her parents wanted her to be a doctor or lawyer. This is Jin's story. It is about choosing your own path.

Many immigrant parents work hard to give their children a better life. They want their children to succeed. They push for safe careers like doctor, lawyer, or engineer. But their children often have different dreams. This story takes place in America. But it could happen anywhere.
